source_pr.title: executor,store/tikv: fix data race
source_pr.body: Fix a data race in test code of last PR.

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: executor,store/tikv: fix data race.
